title: Potato Heroes
body:
## ❓ What is Potato Heroes?
Potato Heroes is a Super Hero themed Addon/Mod for [ThreeTAG's Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium).

## 📃 Current Heroes


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Superman (& Alts)
- Superboy (& Alts)
- Martian Manhunter (& Alts)
- Shazam (& Alts)
- Black Adam (& Alts)
- The Flash (& Alts)
- Reverse Flash
- Zoom
- Black Flash
- Aquaman
- Wonder Women
- Atom
- Batman (& Alts)
- Batman Beyond
- Hawkgirl
- Nova (& Alts)
- Vision
- Ikaris
- Invincible
- Omniman
- Thragg
- Green Lantern
- X Kryptonite Vial
- Cyborg Superman

</details>

## 🪛 Info
Green lantern ring and X Kryptonite Vial can be used in the left hand, Superboy becomes almost the same power as superman if he holds X Kryptonite Shard in his inventory, all Supermans except Kingdom Come Superman (including Cyborg Superman and X Kryptonite) take damage from Kryptonite item and block and blue kryptonite makes them no different from a human wearing armor.

After activating the ring to activate the weapons in the green lantern, you can switch between weapons by scrolling the number 1 button after activating the ring or you can turn it off.

The Addon is still in beta phase, if there is a problem or something you want me to add, you can contact me via discord.

## 🔧 Obtaining
In order to get Superman's scrolls, put a respawn anchor next to a villager and let him be a kryptonian villager (Why he has no powers When villager become a Kryptonian Villager, you will see blue kryptonite in 2 different places on him, it prevents his powers)
